summary: bin/rails test (RAILS_ENV=test, PARALLEL_WORKERS=1 to avoid a fork-related hang in this sandboxed environment) executes 234 runs / 774 assertions with 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips. This includes test/services/phases/restart_define_test.rb, which the prior iteration's implementer fixed by adding attempt: 2 to the three step_runs.create! calls that previously collided with the step_runs(:requirements_ready) fixture on index_step_runs_unique_without_shard. bin/rubocop (rubocop-rails-omakase) inspected 151 files with no offenses. Only Ruby/Rails files changed in this build phase (controllers, helpers, models, queries, services, views for the human-in-the-loop pause/menu-loop feature); no worker (Node/TS) code was touched, so no additional test runner applies.
